Preterit.turoyo: azzé maškele 385; prs 137/20; maškalle ʕal ḥḏoḏe 386; prs 164/11; azzino maškeli gab u=rabo, u=rabo omər sūmne! ‘I went to complain to the head (of the customs), and he said: ono ṭləbli mine u=šuġl-awo w-hiye lo=maqbele w-aṯyono maškeli aʕle ‘I demanded

Infectum.turoyo: duš maškena ʕal ḥḏoḏe 395; prs 121/4; prs 225/16; g-əzzehən l-Miḏyaḏ w-g-əzzehən l-Diyārbắkər, g-maškən aʕlan, gd-əṯyo i=ḥkuma, w-latlan taqa d-i=ḥkuma
translations: ‘They are going to go to Midyat and to Diyarbakir and they are going to inform against us, and (then) the government will come, and we have no strength against the government’ 71/18;

Imperative.turoyo: zəx aškáy s-u=rabo d-at=taʕle 407; prs 195/6; aḥna, u=māl-ano, šqilan b-ak=kallat-ayḏan. d-ubʕət maškay!
translations: geh klage beim Häuptling der Füchse
‘wir haben diese Ware mit unserem Gelde gekauft. Wenn du willst, so reich eine Klage ein!’;
